overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a neon-lit futuristic city. The player character walks through covered plazas, past hotels with outdoor dining, up stairs to an elevated walkway, through a busy downtown intersection with towering holographic billboards, and down city streets with moving traffic. The scene features heavy neon lighting in pink, blue, and green hues reflecting off wet pavement.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered plaza toward the stairway

entered.detail: red overhead structure with large white 08 markings
large blue rectangular planter with tree
tall building with pink neon HOテル signage
wide concrete stairs leading to upper level
vertical cyan neon light strips flanking the walkway

segments.scene_description: Walking under a massive red overpass marked with '08', the scene shows a covered pedestrian plaza with wet concrete reflecting neon lights. A blue tree planter sits in the center while the neon HOテル sign glows in the distance. The camera moves steadily forward toward a concrete stairway where pedestrians are gathered.

events.description: turns right around the hotel corner, revealing outdoor diner seating with pink neon lighting

agents.ego_description: navigating around the hotel corner, passing the outdoor neon diner

notable_agents.action: sitting at the outdoor diner bar with neon pink lighting

entered.detail: outdoor seating area with bright pink neon under awning
massive yellow and blue structural column with red neon strip
wet asphalt street with neon reflections

segments.scene_description: Turning the corner around the hotel, the camera reveals an outdoor diner with vibrant pink neon lighting where patrons sit at the bar. The large HOテル sign dominates the left side while a massive support pillar rises on the right. The wet pavement reflects the colorful lights as pedestrians walk by.

events.description: begins ascending concrete stairs to upper pedestrian level

agents.ego_description: climbing the concrete stairs to the upper pedestrian walkway

notable_agents.action: descending the stairs toward the camera wearing white shoes

entered.detail: metal railings along both sides of the concrete stairs
opening at top of stairs leading to elevated pedestrian area

segments.scene_description: Ascending the wide concrete stairway flanked by metal railings, the camera moves from the street level up to the elevated walkway. The HOテル sign recedes into the distance on the left while pedestrians descend past the camera. The enclosed stairwell features artificial lighting with neon accents.

scene_state.functional_zone: major downtown intersection with neon billboards

events.description: exits stairway into open downtown intersection with towering neon billboards and skyscrapers
crosses the intersection as a floating vehicle hovers nearby and cars pass

agents.ego_description: walking through the busy downtown intersection surrounded by neon skyscrapers and crowds

notable_agents.action: floating vehicle hovering above the street near the intersection

entered.detail: towering buildings covered in holographic advertisements and neon lights
massive curved digital billboard displaying REAL WATER advertisement
futuristic hovering car near the intersection
wide open plaza area with crosswalks and heavy pedestrian traffic

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the stairs into a vast downtown intersection, the scene opens up to reveal towering skyscrapers covered in massive holographic billboards and neon advertisements. The REAL WATER billboard dominates the view while a floating vehicle hovers near the street. Dense crowds of pedestrians fill the crosswalks as the camera navigates through the bustling plaza.

scene_state.functional_zone: city street canyon with moving traffic

events.description: enters narrower street canyon with moving traffic on the right side

agents.ego_description: walking down the city street canyon alongside moving traffic

notable_agents.action: black car driving down the street alongside the sidewalk

entered.detail: narrow street flanked by tall buildings on both sides creating an urban canyon
active traffic lane with multiple vehicles driving past

segments.scene_description: Moving from the open intersection into a narrower street canyon, the camera walks alongside moving traffic with vehicles passing on the right. The tall buildings now line both sides of the street, their neon advertisements reflecting off the wet asphalt. The environment shifts from the wide plaza to a more enclosed urban corridor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a sheltered pedestrian plaza into the heart of a towering, neon-drenched urban center. It begins under a massive red overpass, moving across wet concrete that reflects blue and red neon lights toward a gathering of pedestrians by a concrete stairway. As the camera turns the corner past a hotel, the scene opens into a vibrant outdoor diner bathed in pink light before ascending a wide stairwell that lifts the perspective from street level to an elevated walkway. The view then expands dramatically upon emerging into a vast downtown intersection dominated by massive holographic billboards and floating vehicles amidst dense crowds. Finally, the camera moves from the open plaza into a narrow street canyon, where the environment shifts into an enclosed corridor of skyscrapers and moving traffic reflecting off the damp asphalt.
